items.headline: I-10 East closed at Beltway 8 due to high water
items.detail: Avoid I-10 E between downtown and Zone 5; use US-90 as alternate. Reopening ETA unknown.

items.headline: Flash flood warning extended for Harris County until 11 PM
items.detail: Rapid rises on Brays Bayou; low-water crossings in Zone 3 impassable.

items.headline: Downtown surface streets clear
items.detail: Routes into Zone 4 (George R. Brown) reported open and passable as of 6:30 PM.

items.headline: Katy / Zone 5 access restricted
items.detail: Mandatory evacuation corridor; non-credentialed vehicles turned back at FM-1463.
